mapper.sql: ( (#{semester} IS NULL AND sm.is_current = 1) OR ( #{semester} IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END = #{semester} ) )

SELECT cs.section_id, cs.enrolled_count FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND
mapper.select:
WITH target_sections AS (
) SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(r.review_id) AS participant_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(enrolled_count), 0) FROM target_sections) AS total_students FROM target_sections ts LEFT JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = ts.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' LEFT JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id

WITH target_sections AS (
) SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) AS overall, ROUND(AVG(r.rating_content), 1) AS content, ROUND(AVG(r.rating_workload), 1) AS workload, ROUND(AVG(r.rating_professor), 1) AS kindness FROM target_sections ts JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = ts.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id

WITH target_sections AS (
) SELECT TO_CHAR(r.review_id) AS review_id, r.rating_overall AS rating, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS created_at, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(r.pros, 4000, 1) AS pros, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(r.cons, 4000, 1) AS cons, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(r.advice, 4000, 1) AS tip, '익명' AS writer FROM target_sections ts JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = ts.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
ORDER BY r.rating_overall DESC, r.created_at DESC, r.review_id DESC
ORDER BY r.rating_overall ASC, r.created_at DESC, r.review_id DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.review_id DESC
